obstacle_groups.label: Top-left corner — x=0..2, y=0..1, touches top and left edges
Top-right corner — x=12..14, y=0..1, touches top and right edges
Right bar A — y=4..5, x=6..14, touches right edge; gap on left x=0..5
Left bar A — y=7..8, x=0..8, touches left edge; gap on right x=9..14
Right bar B — y=12..13, x=6..14, touches right edge; gap on left x=0..5
Left bar B — y=15..16, x=0..8, touches left edge; gap on right x=9..14
Bottom-left corner — x=0..2, y=18..19, touches bottom and left edges
Bottom-right corner — x=12..14, y=18..19, touches bottom and right edges
